user.title: Whole House Fan Controller
user.description: Select the three switch entities, define the speed relay truth table, and configure short safety delays around speed changes.

data.name: Name
data.power_off_delay: Delay after master power off before speed change, seconds
data.speed_settle_delay: Delay after speed relays change before power on, seconds

error.duplicate_entities: Each role must use a different switch entity.
error.invalid_speed_map: Speed map must contain Low, Medium, and High.
error.invalid_timer_range: Timer values must be greater than zero.
error.min_greater_than_max: Minimum hours must be less than or equal to maximum hours.
error.default_out_of_range: Default hours must be between minimum and maximum hours.

abort.already_configured: This power switch is already configured.
